inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

inputs.label: Shape
inputs.businessContext: Shape of the area. Different formulas apply for different shapes.

inputs.label: Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius for circular areas. Required when shape is 'circle'.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.businessContext: Base length for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Height for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

rules: If shape is 'rectangle', length and width must be > 0.
If shape is 'circle', radius must be > 0.
If shape is 'triangle', base and height must be > 0.

formulas.squareFootage: shape === 'rectangle' ? length * width : shape === 'circle' ? Math.PI * radius * radius : shape === 'triangle' ? 0.5 * base * height : 0
